name: Future Tech License
description: This is beyond your technical understanding. You'll have to research this on your own to figure it out.

name: Quantum Torpedo Access Temporary
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Quantum Torpedoes. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Star Tail Cells even if it is normally not stocked there. 	This is beyond your technical understanding. You'll have to reverse engineer this tech using your own foundational knowledge as a guide. 	This tech can be researched instead of purchased. (Hover/Tap the attributes below for more details.) 	After this is acquired it can be found in the Licenses area in future visits to the outfitter.

name: Quantum Torpedo Tech License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Quantum Torpedoes. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Star Tail Cells even if it is normally not stocked there.

name: Quantum Drive (Damaged)
description: The Quantum Drive allows travel to any point in time and space... When it's working properly. This damaged Quantum Drive still makes it possible to travel over distances beyond what can be achieved with a regular Jump Drive.

name: Electron Ion Turret
description: The internal diagnostic program indicates that it is a Tarazed test model prototype. But all of the listed log entries are in the future instead of the past.

name: Heavy Double Anti-Missile
description: A few customers have expressed an interest in buying a Heavy Double Anti-Missile Turret in the past. But in market research surveys it has never beaten demand for some form of Particle Turret.

name: Refurbished Fusion Cannon
description: There is an old faded piece of paper attached to the targeting control panel: 	"We've done our best to restore this old Prototype Fusion Cannon to a functional state. I'm glad I was able to end my career on a high note. Make sure you come back from this mission in one piece. You won't want to miss my retirement party!" - Barmy

name: Quantum Torpedo
description: Quantum Torpedoes are ammunition for the Quantum Torpedo Launcher. Each Quantum Torpedo Launcher can hold 30 of them. You cannot install torpedoes unless you have also installed a launcher to fire them from.

name: Quantum Torpedo Rack
description: The Quantum Torpedo Storage Rack is used to store extra ammunition for Quantum Torpedo Launchers.

name: Quantum Torpedo Depot
description: The Quantum Torpedo Storage Depot stages extra ammunition in your cargo bay for weapons that use Quantum Torpedoes. The ammunition is ready to be withdrawn for use. Storing it this way uses more cargo space than if it were packed away in sealed crates. An extra crewmember is required to maintain inventory.

name: Quantum Torpedo Launcher
description: Quantum Torpedoes are able to quantum shift though obstacles that block line of sight to the target. This effect also negates anti-missile defenses and penetrates shields. The manufacturer is unknown.

name: Quantum Torpedo Pod
description: Quantum Torpedoes are able to quantum shift though obstacles that block line of sight to the target. This effect also negates anti-missile defenses and penetrates shields. The manufacturer is unknown. 	Pods enable fighters and other light craft to carry small quantities of Torpedoes into battle while retaining enough space for other weapons. Large ships are better off with full-size launchers.

name: Vacuum Ramscoop
description: This Vacuum Ramscoop aggressively collects fuel from the solar wind, but loses power and generates heat while it does so. Though it appears to be a product of Deep Sky, none of their outfitters recognize it.

name: Modified S-270 Regenerator
description: This modified S-270 regenerator restores shields more quickly but drains more energy and runs hotter than the standard version.

name: Modified S-970 Regenerator
description: This modified S-970 regenerator restores shields more quickly but drains more energy and runs hotter than the standard version.

name: S-KR53 Hull Repair System
description: This hull repair system from Syndicate Systems is more advanced than anything in their catalogue and should be a top seller. Strangely, any Syndicate sales representative who is asked about this product claims it doesn't exist.

name: North Wind Helium
description: While bulkier than the industry standard Liquid Helium Cooler, this new system offers additional emergency cooling if the ship starts to overheat.

name: Apocalypse Core
description: This appears to be a collaboration between Lovelace Labs and Turner Inc. However, this product does not appear in either company's catalogue.

name: A510 Atomic Engines
description: This compact steering and thrusting engine isn't as efficient as separate atomic thruster and steering engines of similar size. But using this can free up a considerable amount of space for other outfits or weapons. It seems like this should be a popular product, but Deep Sky outfitters have never heard of it.

name: Scattershot Ammo Access Temporary License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Scattershot Ammo. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Scattershot Ammo even if it is normally not stocked there. 	The version available for purchase is written in an alien language you don't understand... 	This tech can be researched instead of purchased. (Hover/Tap the attributes below for more details.) 	After this is acquired it can be found in the Licenses area in future visits to the outfitter.

name: Scattershot Ammo Tech License
description: This technical manual details how to manufacture Scattershot Ammo. Having this makes it possible for any outfitter to offer Scattershot Ammo even if it is normally not stocked there.

name: Korath Disruptor Gun
description: Korath Disruptors interfere with a ship's shields, allowing a ship's hull to be damaged even when shields are up. However, they do very little hull damage by themselves.

name: Vector Engine (Reality Class)
description: Endless skirmishes among the rival Korath forces have produced a mockery of the word efficiency. Although total power output is increased considerably, the waste energy is very nearly enough to offset the advantages.

name: Quarg Ranseur
description: The Quarg Ranseur has a longer range than the Skylance but is a less powerful beam weapon.

name: Quarg Skydagger
description: Older Quarg vessels are outfitted with this beam weapon instead of the more infamous Skylance.

Missions: Midnight Expansion: Pirate Sales - Quarg Skydagger

name: Quarg Culverin
description: This multipurpose weapon deals incredibly high shield damage at short range before the shot changes into an incredibly fast, shield-piercing blast.

Missions: Midnight Expansion: Pirate Sales - Quarg Culverin

name: Fluxion Shield Generator
description: The first humans who met the Quarg thought that their technology worked on magic, and many even think so to this day. The mechanism by which this Quarg shield generator works is completely unknown to humanity, and the Quarg aren't interested in giving up their secrets.

name: Infimum Shield Generator
description: The first humans who met the Quarg thought that their technology worked on magic, and many even think so to this day. The mechanism by which this Quarg shield generator works is completely unknown to humanity, and the Quarg aren't interested in giving up their secrets.

Missions: Midnight Expansion: Midnight Market - Infimum Shield Generator 2

name: Tachyon Core
description: Although humanity is now capable of producing antimatter in relatively significant quantities when compared to a thousand years ago, it is still nothing compared to the Quarg. The Quarg can produce enough antimatter to outfit every ship with an extremely efficient antimatter core, producing extreme amounts of energy with surprisingly little waste heat.

Missions: Midnight Expansion: Heliarch Scouting - Tachyon Core

name: Korath Electro Shocker
description: The Shocker Gun is designed to incapacitate small vessels long enough for a Korath mothership to disable and pillage them. 	The Korath began using ion based weaponry after plundering this technology from a rodent-like species they encountered to the west of their space.

name: Korath Shocker Turret
thumbnail: outfit/Midnight PR4987 korath heavy shock turret
description: This turret bears a larger version of the Shocker Gun which rapidly drains its target's energy reserves. If it doesn't have the generator capacity to spare, the unfortunate target may soon be stripped bare by a Korath raiding party. 	Access to ion based weapons were essential to staving off the autonomous hordes which dominated the later stages of the Korath civil war.

Ships: Korath World Crafter (Kor Efret World Crafter)

name: Fuel Refiner
description: The Korath developed this giant fuel processor for capital ships that carry many of their fuel-guzzling outfits. It maintains a negative vacuum pressure, pulling gas into the ramscoops faster than a fuel processor would alone.

Ships: Korath World Crafter (Kor Efret World Crafter)

name: Korath Defense Drone
description: These flying defense drones are released when intruders board the ship. Once one intruder has been neutralized, a laser emitter with a 360 degree firing arc allows it to quickly switch targets without pausing to reorient itself.

Ships: Korath World Crafter (Kor Efret World Crafter)

name: Korath Shock-Strike
description: This weapon adds an ionic charge to Korath Grab-Strike projectiles, further incapacitating the targeted ship to prevent it from escaping.

name: Fuel Stabilizer
description: Refineries utilize this device to separate impurities from harvested gaseous elements and process it into a liquid or solid for easier storage. 	It can also be used during fuel transportation. In rare situations, a sudden change in temperature can cause fuel to expand or contract, resulting in burst fuel tanks. A Fuel Stabilizer can help protect fuel carried during transport by regulating its state as a solid, liquid, or gas.

name: Accelerator Cannon
description: The Accelerator Cannon is a relatively new addition to the Unfettered arsenal. Projectiles launched by this weaponized particle accelerator retain some electromagnetic properties, causing some disruption in the power systems of any target struck by them. Due to their immense space requirements, few Unfettered captains are willing to radically alter their ships existing loadout for accomodating this weapon.

name: "Biri Biri" Afterburner
description: This tiny afterburner is considered a relic from the past among many Hai. Only the Unfettered still use them.

name: Langrage Hyper-Launcher
description: This non-turreted version of the Langrage Hyper-Heaver lacks the ability to rotate itself, but each shot delivers a larger payload. 	At close range, the heaved langrage merely forces the enemy back. As the launch field collapses and the langrage returns fully to normal space, however, it is rent into a rapidly-expanding cloud of deadly projectiles.

name: Radiological Containment
description: These cargo storage cylinders are designed to contain hazardous radioactive waste. Their internal structure also interferes with incoming scans enough to completely conceal a portion of cargo carried while making the rest harder to scan.

name: Scattershot Ammo
description: Scattershot shells are packed into special racks designed for loading the Scattershot Gun. 	Genesis ammunition, professionally manufactured by their industrial mass production factories, is a critical element to many of their weapons. Quality control measures at these facilities make them less likely to jam.

name: Scattershot Rack
description: Scattershot Racks are used to store extra ammunition for Scattershot Guns.

name: Scattershot Depot
description: The Scattershot Depot stages extra ammunition in your cargo bay for weapons that use Scattershot Ammo. The ammunition is ready to be withdrawn for use. Storing it this way uses more cargo space than if it were packed away in sealed crates. An extra crewmember is required to oversee maintenance of the ammunition.

name: Scattershot Gun
description: The Scattershot Gun racks shells that split into multiple shots which spread out to cover a wide area. 	Genesis mechanical weapons technology is far ahead of their energy weapons development. The loading systems on them are less likely to jam compared to species that put more resources on developing their energy weapons.

name: Shock Wave Blaster
description: Shock Wave Blasters were originally the weapon of choice for the Hai Imperial Guard. They eventually fell out of favor as pulse and ion technology rose to prominence. 	The ionized plasma fired from these weapons is composed of charged particles that are extremely volatile. They lose cohesion after only a short distance of flight, making them less effective against distant targets.

name: Shock Wave Blaster Turret
description: Mounting only a single Shockwave Blaster, this older version of the Shock Wave Turret is a viable option for arming smaller ships.

name: Shock Wave Turret
description: Shock Wave Blasters are no longer utilized in modern Hai fleets, but have seen a resurgence among Unfettered raiders. Mounting two of these weapons on a rotating turret base is a recent Unfettered innovation.

name: Korath Waste
description: This irradiated industrial waste is a byproduct of Korath manufacturing processes.

Ships: Korath World Crafter (Kor Efret World Crafter)

name: Korath Waste Launcher
description: The factories on larger Korath world ships produce a tremendous amount of waste. This weapon takes the most dangerous irradiated waste and fires it as a projectile that is very effective against shields.

Ships: Korath World Crafter (Kor Efret World Crafter)
